ValidationRule.description: All Opportunities with the Status Closed Lost need to have a Reason for the Lose.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
ZImportSource__c != "Print Plus - Talend Job #1020", ISPICKVAL( StageName , "Closed Lost"), ISBLANK( ReasonWonLost__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Every Opportunity with the Stage 'Close Lost' needs a 'Reason Won/Lost'. (OP004)
